item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Aviation Safety Reform
item.description:
👀 Aviation Safety Reform

FAA/Boeing-class safety reform 119th Congress: certification process · regulatory-capture provisions · whistleblower protections. Composes with Whistleblower Protection Expansion + Federal Cybersecurity Investment. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
